index.title: Home
index.heading: The D3 Stat Lab
index.description: I love crunching data of all kinds. This site houses Division III Women's Basketball data (like NPI!).

publishing_tracker.title: Publishing Tracker
publishing_tracker.heading: Publishing Tracker
publishing_tracker.description: Track 2025-26 Schedule and Roster publishing progress.

legend.Team: Name of the college or university basketball team
legend.Schedule Published?: Whether the team has published their 2025-26 season schedule
legend.Roster Published?: Whether the team has published their 2025-26 roster

preseason_rankings.title: 26-27 Preseason Rankings
preseason_rankings.heading: 26-27 Preseason Rankings
preseason_rankings.description: Way too early preseason rankings for the upcoming 2026-27 D3 WBB season.

legend.Team: Name of the college or university basketball team
legend.Region: NCAA tournament region the team belongs to
legend.Returning: Percentage of scoring production returning from previous season
legend.Projected Preseason Rank: Projected ranking for the start of the season
legend.Safe Losses Threshold: Maximum number of losses a team can sustain while remaining safe for tournament selection
legend.Dangerous: This number of losses puts the team in a precarious position for tournament selection

returners.title: Returning and Non-Returning
returners.heading: Returning and Non-Returning
returners.description: For teams with published rosters, which teams have the most underclassmen minutes not returning, minutes incoming from D3 transfers, minutes returning from 5th years, and more.

legend.Team: Name of the college or university basketball team
legend.Pub?: Whether the team has published their roster publicly
legend.Surp Gone: Unexpected player departures and lost minutes
legend.Exp Gone: Expected player departures and lost minutes
legend.Transfers In: Minutes gained from incoming D3 transfer players
legend.5th: Minutes by Fifth-year players returning for an additional season
legend.5th Year Last Names: Names of the fifth-year players on the roster

npi.title: NPI
npi.heading: NPI
npi.description: Daily NCAA Power Index (NPI) values, rankings, and analysis for D3 WBB.

legend.Team: Name of the college or university basketball team
legend.NPI Value: Current NCAA Power Index numerical value
legend.Value Diff: Change in NPI value from previous calculation
legend.NPI Rank: Current national ranking based on NPI value
legend.Rank Diff: Change in ranking position from previous update
legend.Bid Type: The current NCAA Tournament Bid type in the latest season simulations
legend.Qual Games: Number of qualifying games included in NPI calculation
legend.Qual Wins: Number of qualifying wins counted in NPI
legend.QWB: Quality Win Bonus - additional metric for evaluating win quality
legend.Lowest Counting Win: NPI value of the weakest win that still counts
legend.Next Game Win NPI: Game NPI of next game, if won
legend.Potential Increase: NPI increase if next game is won
legend.Next Game Loss NPI: Game NPI of next game, if lost
legend.Rem Games < 50.00 NPI: Remaining games against teams with NPI below 50.00

season_simulations.title: Season Simulations
season_simulations.heading: Season Simulations
season_simulations.description: D3 WBB season simulations, based off Efficiency Ratings, to project NCAA Qualification rates.

legend.Team: Name of the college or university basketball team
legend.MedW: Median number of wins projected across simulations
legend.MedL: Median number of losses projected across simulations
legend.Tourn%: Percentage of simulations making the NCAA Tournament
legend.AQ%: Percentage of simulations winning their conference's automatic qualifier
legend.At-Large%: Percentage of simulations getting an at-large bid
legend.ALWYNI%: Percentage of simulations NOT winning their conference's AQ, and getting an at-large bid
legend.F-AL%: Percentage of simulations getting an at-large bid when final loss was in conference finals
legend.SF-AL%: Percentage of simulations getting an at-large bid when final loss was in conference semifinals
legend.QF-AL%: Percentage of simulations getting an at-large bid when final loss was in conference quarterfinals
legend.Top4%: Percentage of simulations finishing in top 4 nationally
legend.Top8%: Percentage of simulations finishing in top 8 nationally
legend.Top16%: Percentage of simulations finishing in top 16 nationally

current_season_rankings.title: Current Season Rankings
current_season_rankings.heading: Current Season Rankings
current_season_rankings.description: Ranking of teams based on this season's results.

legend.Team: Name of the college or university basketball team
legend.Value of Results: Numerical value representing quality of season results
legend.TOP 50 W: Number of wins against teams ranked in top 50
legend.OUT OF TOP 30 L: Number of losses to teams ranked outside top 30
legend.Overall Wins Massey: Total wins according to Massey ratings system
legend.Eff: Team efficiency rating for the current season

composite_rankings.title: Composite Rankings
composite_rankings.heading: Composite Rankings
composite_rankings.description: Team Rankings based off median of NPI, Massey, Efficiency, and Current Season Results.

legend.Team: Name of the college or university basketball team
legend.Region: NCAA tournament region the team belongs to
legend.Massey Rank: Team ranking according to Massey rating system
legend.Eff Rank: Team ranking based on efficiency metrics
legend.NPI Rank: Team ranking based on NCAA Power Index
legend.Curr Season Results Rank: Ranking based on current season performance
legend.Strength of Record: Measures how difficult a team's win-loss record is to achieve based on its schedule
legend.Wins Above Bubble: Measures how many more (or fewer) wins a team has compared to what an average bubble team would be expected to achieve against the same schedule
legend.MEDIAN: Median value across all ranking systems (not including preseason)
legend.Stdev: Standard deviation across different ranking systems

conference_rankings.title: Conference Rankings
conference_rankings.heading: Conference Rankings
conference_rankings.description: Ranking of Conferences based off non-conference results.

legend.Rank: Conference ranking position based on performance
legend.Region: Geographic region where the conference is located
legend.Win: Total wins by conference teams in non-conference play
legend.Loss: Total losses by conference teams in non-conference play
legend.Wins: Average Massey ranking of non-conference teams beat
legend.STAT: Statistical performance indicator for the conference

distances.title: Distances
distances.heading: School Distance Calculator
distances.description: Calculate the driving distance between any two D3 Basketball schools.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions about D3 basketball data or want to collaborate? Send me a message!

premium.title: Premium
premium.heading: Premium D3 Women's Basketball Single Team Report
premium.description: Know exactly where your team stands—and which games will decide their tournament fate. Every Monday, delivered to your inbox.
premium.multiProductDescription: In-depth analytics for your team, delivered to your inbox.

products.name: Offseason Outlook Report
products.tagline: Know exactly where your team stands heading into next season. Returning production, conference outlook, regional rankings, and roster analysis—all in one report.
products.sampleDescription: A 12-page offseason deep dive: returning production, graduation vulnerability, conference and regional outlook, coaching changes, top returners, and full roster analysis.
products.pricingClarification: One-time purchase for the 2026 offseason. Not a subscription—no recurring charges.

features.title: Season Summary & Returning Production
features.description: Your team's record, NPI, NCAA Tournament result, returning scoring percentage, and scoring distribution by class with a conference-wide heat map

features.title: Graduation Vulnerability & Coaching Changes
features.description: Which conference teams lose the most from their top 5 scorers, key departures by name, and head coaching changes in your conference and region

features.title: Conference & Regional Outlook
features.description: Full conference standings with returning %, NCAA Tournament drought history, Region Top 25 projected preseason rankings, and returning All-Americans

features.title: Roster Outlook & Top Returners
features.description: Your full roster split into potential returners and graduates with per-30 stats, Impact scores, and minutes share—plus the top returning players across your conference

products.name: Single Team Report
products.tagline: Know exactly where your team stands—and which games will decide their tournament fate. Every Monday, delivered to your inbox.
products.sampleDescription: A 21-page deep dive: tournament odds, player impact rankings, and exactly why each upcoming game matters.
products.pricingClarification: One-time purchase for the 2025-26 season. Not a subscription—no recurring charges.
pricingFeatures: Weekly PDF report delivered every Monday
Full coverage from November through March
products.urgencyNote: Purchase now and your first report delivers November 2, 2026. Weekly reports every Monday through March.

features.title: Complete Team Analytics
features.description: NPI, efficiency ratings, tempo, height rankings, returning production, roster breakdown, radar charts, and composite rankings across multiple rating systems

features.title: Tournament Projections
features.description: NCAA Tournament odds from 10,000+ simulations, auto-bid vs. at-large percentages, Top-4/8/16 probabilities, at-large bid scenarios, and conference tournament outlook

features.title: Weekly Game Previews
features.description: Upcoming matchups with win probabilities, playoff leverage scores, opponent key players, past week results, and NPI change attribution

features.title: Player Impact Analysis
features.description: Full roster with Pts/30, Reb/30, Ast/30, impact scores, plus/minus stats, playing time percentages, and week-over-week performance tracking

success.title: Success
success.heading: Payment Successful! 🎉
success.description: Your report is confirmed! Check your inbox (and spam folder) for delivery details.

cancel.title: Canceled
cancel.heading: Payment Canceled
